title: geschollia occultans
intro: Geschollia occultans, a type of flowering plant, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The Geschollia occultans plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
